title: Roofing, Siding, and Insulation Material Merchant Wholesalers

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 423330 ($4,572,507,971) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 423330 ($74,992,503,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).
